Index files into the N5 cognition brain at block-level granularity.

positional arguments:
  paths                 Files or directories to index (directories scan for
                        .md files recursively).

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --dry-run             Scan and chunk files without writing to the database.
  --log-level LOG_LEVEL
                        Set the log level (DEBUG | INFO | WARNING | ERROR).
